case_title: HU, ELLEN et al VS SOLIS, FRANCIS

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL TO FRANCIS SOLIS RETURNED SIGNED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SOLIS, FRANCIS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HU, ELLEN HU, NICK AS TO DEFENDANT SOLIS, FRANCIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HU, ELLEN HU, NICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLIS, FRANCIS $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,060.00, THE COURT APPOINTS HELEN HU AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR NICK HU, AS MINOR, NUNC PRO TUNC TO THE DATE OF FILING OF THE CLAIM. THE JUDGMENT IS HEREIN; TO BE ALLOTED AS FOLLOWS: $750 TO PLAINTIFF ELLEN HU; AND $1250 TO PLAINTIFF NICK HU THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
